The Stewards

Document 24
Date 22 May 2026
Time 16:17
Title Infringement - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags
Description Infringement - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags
Enclosed CAN DOC 24 - Free Practice 1 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow.pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers

 
 
 
 
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 – 24 May 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 24 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  22 May 2026 
 
        Time  16:17 
  
 
The lap times set by the F1 cars that went through the double waved yellow flag zone will be deleted as detailed in the 
Race Director’s Competition Notes (item 11, document 6): 
 
Session Free Practice 1 
  
Fact The F1 cars passed through a double waved yellow flag marshalling sector. 
 
1 4 18 Lance Stroll Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 12:38:07 1:35.239 
2 4 12 Kimi Antonelli Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team 12:38:09 1:41.379 
3 7 55 Carlos Sainz Atlassian Williams F1 Team 12:57:26 PIT 
4 7 63 George Russell Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team 12:57:26 PIT 
5 1 31 Esteban Ocon TGR Haas F1
